programme.title: Angry Planet | Italia Wild
programme.desc: Italy is one of the very few nations in the world that regularly gets three major extreme natural phenomena – volcanos, flooding, and avalanches. Eastern flanks of the volcano to slip by up to two metres, and many houses on the flanks of the volcano experienced structural damage. The eruption also completely destroyed the Rifugio Sapienza, on the southern flank of the volcano. The Rifugio was the site of a cable car station which had previously been destroyed in the 1983 eruption; both have now been rebuilt. The most recent eruption was in November 2006.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Kenya
programme.desc: Definitely our wildest episode so far. Here’s the deal: Mt. Elgon is an 14,000 foot volcano in eastern Kenya. We propose a safari/ascent of the dormant volcano. Here’s the first kicker: High on the the flanks of the volcano is Kitum Cave – a cave created by the most unique form of erosion – Elephant Erosion. For millennia elephants have been going into the cave to carve it out with their tusks in order to eat the salty rock. Here’s the second kicker: the cave is thought to be the home of the Ebola Marberg virus – the world’s most deadly virus. So here’s the plan: We are going enter the cave, at night, wearing full Bio-Hazard suits to protect us from the virus.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Indian Monsoon
programme.desc: Monsoon seasons drops as much as 40 feet of water on parts of the parched sub-continent.

programme.title: Angry Planet | Iceland
programme.desc: The Land of Ice and Fire – Iceland – is a fascinating and ruggedly demanding country - a perfect subject for exploration by “Angry Planet”. The northern island nation has many of the wild features that we love – volcanoes, glaciers, avalanches, mudslides, big waves, and extreme marine weather. All that – plus weird red and green lights dancing around in the winter sky!

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The moment you all have been waiting for is here – it’s mission day. While the contestants wait for word from HQ, no time is wasted outfitting them with mission essentials. When word comes through with strict orders not to engage with the cartel, but to save any hostages they come across, the team must use all their training thus far to pull off this important recon operation.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: Viewers get an inside scoop on the creation of Modern Pneumatic Air Rifles and their origin story. Spoiler Alert, it involves a big game hunt in South Africa. Next, Athlon Optics goes over how they’ve revolutionized Hog Hunting and thermal optics as a whole. Later, we get a look at the leader board and how close the race is going into the finale.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The mission is still imminent, but something pressing came up.. some really cool guns! This course of fire includes an amazing rifle, a man down and an opportunity to go full-auto. Then, Crossfire lets the team try out a tactical bat that includes a 22LR Pistol and a window breaker spike. If that’s not enough to get the blood pumping, the contestants try out a silencer fit for the most secretive of missions and a John Wick shotgun. Buckle up.

programme.title: Aftermath
programme.desc: From suppressors to a shotgun fresh off the movie set of John Wick 4, the contestants got spoiled this week with amazing tactical weapons. Chris and Cindy sit down with Genesis Arms to get the scoop on how the team is doing prior to the finale. Mark Baylis, Green Beret, also sits down with our hosts to talk about his invaluable nonprofit that is changing the lives of hundreds of American Veterans.

programme.title: Surviving Mann
programme.desc: The night mission is a go.. or so they thought. As the team readied for the night mission, word from HQ derails the plan. The team has to act fast to adapt to an ever-changing hostage situation. With an ingenious plan formed, some contestants have to go undercover to get the intel needed to complete the mission. See who this season's winner is on the nail-biter season finale of Surviving Mann.
